entities.name: LEASYSCAN
entities.description: A phenotyping platform developed to target canopy development and conductance traits, utilizing 3D scanning and analytical scales to measure transpiration.

entities.name: 3D SCANNING TECHNIQUE
entities.description: A novel imaging method used by LeasyScan to capture leaf area development continuously.

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring plant parameters, currently identified as a main bottleneck in the genomics revolution.

entities.name: IMAGING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies providing opportunities for easier, faster, and more informative phenotyping of plant parameters.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop used to compare leaf area development patterns across different agro-ecological zones.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A crop used for the mapping of QTLs for vigour traits.

entities.name: DROUGHT ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a plant to survive and produce under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: PLANT WATER BUDGET
entities.description: Traits controlling the amount of water a plant uses and retains at earlier stages.

entities.name: CANOPY DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth and structure of the plant's upper foliage, targeted by the LeasyScan platform.

entities.name: CONDUCTANCE TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the movement of water and gases through the plant, targeted by the LeasyScan platform.

entities.name: LEAF AREA DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The continuous growth of leaf surface area, captured via 3D scanning.

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION
entities.description: The process of water movement through a plant and its evaporation from aerial parts, measured by analytical scales.

entities.name: VIGOUR TRAITS
entities.description: Traits related to the overall health and growth strength of the plant.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The capacity of a plant to maintain growth and yield during drought stress.

entities.name: PLANT WATER USE
entities.description: The overall efficiency and amount of water utilized by the plant.

entities.name: QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci used for mapping specific traits like vigour and drought tolerance.

entities.name: WATER AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The amount of water available to the plant, especially critical during the grain filling period.

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when saturated.

entities.name: GENOMICS REVOLUTION
entities.description: The rapid advancement in genomic sequencing and analysis.

entities.name: GRAIN FILLING PERIOD
entities.description: The stage of crop development where seeds are filled with nutrients.

entities.name: SCANNER-TO-PLANT CONCEPT
entities.description: A design approach used in LeasyScan to increase imaging throughput.

entities.name: AGRO-ECOLOGICAL ZONES
entities.description: Different environmental regions used to compare breeding material of pearl millet.
